summary: Soundboard recording with a questionable release version; no musical details provided
review: The lone review notes the tape chain (Beyer M‑160s into a Sony TC‑D5) and labels this particular Jim Wise version as “wrong,” assigning it a middling three stars. No comments are made about the performance itself, so the show quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review giving a 3‑star rating and focusing on the release version rather than performance; limited data leads to a modest rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions Beyer M‑160s and Sony TC‑D5 tape equipment, but calls the release version wrong, suggesting possible mastering or source issues.
